message:
test(visual_fx): wire orphan effects + add 41 tests for screen_melt/underwater_warp (bd-2lzfx)

Wire three orphan effect modules (doom_fire, screen_melt, underwater_warp)
into visual_fx/effects/mod.rs so they compile and their tests run. Remove
invalid crate-level #![forbid(unsafe_code)] from submodules. Fix unused
variable warnings in underwater_warp.rs.

Add 20 new tests for screen_melt (xorshift RNG, column offset init range
and adjacency, advance mechanics, frozen frame capture, completion, reset)
and 21 new tests for underwater_warp (turbsin table properties, lookup
interpolation/wrapping, quality degradation, zero amplitude, time variance,
pixel source validation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
